name: school-timetable-system
description: Production-ready AI School Timetable Management System

scripts.build: npm install --include=dev && npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/validation && npm run build -w packages/utils && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/types && npm run build -w packages/validation && npm run api:build && npm run build -w apps/web
